summary: Applied ADR 0209 on the live runbook delivery path by extracting the shared runbook use-case service behind thin CLI, Windmill, API gateway, and ops-portal adapters, replaying the rebased gateway, portal, and Windmill converges from the isolated worktree, and re-verifying the safe validation-gate runbook end to end through the worker, gateway, and portal surfaces.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/runbook_executor.py scripts/api_gateway/main.py scripts/ops_portal/app.py platform/use_cases/runbooks.py config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py scripts/gate_status.py` passed, `make syntax-check-api-gateway` and `make syntax-check-ops-portal` passed, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with fastapi==0.116.1 --with httpx==0.28.1 --with cryptography==45.0.6 --with PyJWT==2.10.1 --with jinja2==3.1.5 --with itsdangerous==2.2.0 --with python-multipart==0.0.20 pytest tests/test_runbook_executor.py tests/test_runbook_executor_windmill.py tests/test_api_gateway.py tests/test_api_gateway_runtime_role.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` passed with the focused runbook surfaces green, and the rebased Windmill topology follow-up `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` passed with `9 passed in 0.17s`.

verification.check: Rebased live converges from the isolated worktree
verification.observed: `make converge-api-gateway`, `make converge-ops-portal`, and the final repaired `make converge-windmill` all completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0209-live-apply`. The first rebased Windmill replay exposed a topology-default regression (`unknown platform service id: windmill`), which the workstream repaired by switching the runtime defaults back to the host-level port facts actually present in the play context before replaying the successful converge.

verification.check: Direct Windmill worker and seeded script verification
verification.observed: Over the documented Proxmox jump path to `ops@10.10.10.20`, `/srv/platform_server/scripts/gate_status.py` was confirmed to contain `def build_status_payload`, and the guest-local Windmill request to `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fgate-status` returned a payload with top-level `status: ok` and the current validation-gate summary.

Using the controller-local platform-context API token over the same SSH path to the runtime VM, `http://127.0.0.1:8083/v1/platform/runbooks?delivery_surface=api_gateway` listed `validation-gate-status`, `POST /v1/platform/runbooks/execute` returned run `runbook-adc16f10-0065-4ee3-a8c8-cfffca3ca94a` in `completed` state, and `GET /v1/platform/runbooks/runbook-adc16f10-0065-4ee3-a8c8-cfffca3ca94a` returned the persisted step result with the same validation-gate payload.

From `docker-runtime-lv3`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/` rendered the `Runbook Launcher`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/runbooks` included `validation-gate-status`, and `curl -fsS -X POST -d 'parameters={}' http://127.0.0.1:8092/actions/runbooks/validation-gate-status` returned the expected `finished with status completed` action fragment.

notes: Direct runtime verification from `docker-runtime-lv3` must use the guest-local listeners `http://127.0.0.1:8083` for the API gateway and `http://127.0.0.1:8000` for Windmill; `http://100.64.0.1:8005` is the Proxmox-host Tailscale proxy and is not expected to listen on the guest loopback.

The earlier long-running unrelated Windmill playbook and seed-sync processes from other workstreams were still visible on the controller during this branch, but the successful replay proved the worker-checkout integrity refresh and the seeded validation-gate script against the current runtime state.

This workstream became the final mainline integration step, so the protected release and canonical-truth files were updated on the same branch after live verification: `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `docs/release-notes/README.md`, `docs/release-notes/0.177.38.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`.
